summary.description: Concise description of the ingestion batch outcome.

evidence.description: Key deduplication and normalization decisions from ingest processing.

anomalies.description: Structural ingest issues only (truncated content, unparseable data, ambiguous dedup, missing sections needed for normalization). Not PHI/PII or compliance.

keyFacts.description: Extracted identifiers for metadata linking (compound codes, phases, endpoints, dataset IDs, trial IDs, RDOC- IDs).

documentsProcessed.description: Count of unique normalized documents after de-duplication.

duplicatesRemoved.description: Number of redundant source items collapsed into an existing canonical document.

normalizedFormats.description: Distinct normalized formats present in the batch (e.g. JATS article, ELN notebook, LIMS CSV).

normalizedDocuments.description: Canonical document inventory after de-duplication and normalization.

sourceItemId.description: Originating items[] itemId; use first canonical item when duplicates were merged.

canonicalKey.description: Primary dedup key: PMC ID, DOI, experiment ID, etc.
